name: Create Maximum Intensity Z-Stack Projection
description: You have access to Fiji with a Z-stack microscopy image. Your task is to generate a maximum intensity projection from the "T1 Head" sample image. Adjust the contrast for optimal visibility and save the resulting projection as a PNG to ~/Fiji_Data/results/max_projection.png. Additionally, perform a measurement of the projection's image statistics and export the data to ~/Fiji_Data/results/projection_stats.csv.

metadata.data_source: Fiji built-in sample (T1 Head CT scan)
